Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2800 "TROOPERTRUCK-2800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Trooper Truck.prg"
Metadata.Notes: To allow the game to start on the title screen instead of in-game, the following changes were made: 1. Changed the JMP $2D9C instruction at $280A to be JMP $1000 instead 2. Added a new routine at $1000 which: a) Sets the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) to allow the game to run correctly b) Sets up the correct VICII settings c) Executes the initialisation subroutine at $354F d) Executes the subroutine at $2B33 to display the title screen and then waits for any key press e) Finally jumps to $2DB3 to start the game, which skips the initial protection check at $2D9C-$2DAE, which verifies $BA is set to tape
